scores.notes: Multiple critical errors including misspelled names (Jeckie berkold, Lemke Iac), addresses (Weod sid, Letrti Landing, Gorezaw Tkroughwal), state names (Lalifornia, Lal;fornic), and garbled text throughout. Date format inconsistent (Z0zs vs 2025). Some numeric values unclear (93& & for square feet, Zo89 for security deposit). Layout structure generally preserved but text accuracy severely compromised.
